required_complexity_patterns.notes: Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters)
Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form
Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words
Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers
Yes/no question as paired button elements, not native radio inputs

reference_templates.title: Table layout form
reference_templates.notes: Form laid out as HTML table with labels in td cells
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Table layout

reference_templates.title: Placeholder-only identification
reference_templates.notes: Empty label element; field identified only by placeholder attribute
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Placeholder only

reference_templates.title: List item fields
reference_templates.notes: Each field wrapped in li inside ul list structure
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: List item fields

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters) Required: Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form Required: Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words Required: Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers Required: Yes/no question as paired button elements, not native radio inputs Reference DOM (Table layout form): Form laid out as HTML table with labels in td cells Reference DOM (Placeholder-only identification): Empty label element; field identified only by placeholder attribute Reference DOM (List item fields): Each field wrapped in li inside ul list structure Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: duplicate-name-attrs, decoy-form, glued-label-text, split-phone, pill-yes-no. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: two-column grid without card wrapper. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Table layout form; Placeholder-only identification; List item fields.
